THE COURT GRANTS CLAIMANT SILVIA WIDJAJA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO WELLS FARGO BANK ACCOUNT ENDING IN 1888. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $117,563.09 TO THE CLAIMANT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $10,242.00 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.COURT SIGNS ORDER AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT CONTINUES THE HEARING ON THIRD PARTY CLAIMANT SYLVIA WIDJAJA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION TO APRIL 3, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MS. WIDJAJA THE OPPORTUNITY TO BRING ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTATION SHOWING IN WHOSE NAME THE BANK ACCOUNT IS HELD AND TRACING THE FUNDS HELD BY THE SHERIFF TO HER EARNINGS. IF CLAIMANT IS CLAIMING THAT THE FUNDS HELD BY THE SHERIFF ARE HER SOLE AND SEPARATE PROPERTY, SHE SHALL ALSO PROVIDE EVIDENCE SO SHOWING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sylvia Widjaja, Tel. 510.387.7938, third party claimant appearing on her own behalf;
Shanshan Zou, Esq. of the Law Office of Martin Goodman, Tel. 415.397.7956, for plaintiff.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court continues the Hearing On Third Party Claimant Sylvia Widjaja's Claim Of Exemption to April 3, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Ms. Widjaja the opportunity to bring additional documentation showing in whose name the bank account is held and tracing the funds held by the Sheriff to her earnings. If claimant is claiming that the funds held by the Sheriff are her sole and separate property, she shall also provide evidence so showing. Order signed. Judge: Marla J.
